CREATE TABLE http_request_headers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, header_name VARCHAR(255), header_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO http_request_headers (id, header_name, header_value) VALUES (1, 'Content-Type', 'application/json');
INSERT INTO http_request_headers (id, header_name, header_value) VALUES (2, 'User-Agent', 'Mozilla/5.0');
INSERT INTO http_request_headers (id, header_name, header_value) VALUES (3, 'Accept', '*/*');
INSERT INTO http_request_headers (id, header_name, header_value) VALUES (4, 'Host', 'example.com');
SELECT http_request_header_full(lines, 'Content-Type', '*none*') FROM http_request_headers WHERE header_name = 'Content-Type';
SELECT header_value FROM http_request_headers WHERE header_name IN (SELECT header_name FROM http_request_headers WHERE header_value LIKE '%json%') AND header_value != '*none*';
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM http_request_headers) AS total_headers, http_request_header_full(lines, 'User-Agent', '*none*') AS user_agent FROM http_request_headers WHERE header_name = 'User-Agent';
SELECT h1.header_value, h2.header_value FROM http_request_headers h1 JOIN http_request_headers h2 ON h1.id != h2.id WHERE h1.header_name = 'Accept' AND h2.header_name = 'Content-Type';
SELECT DISTINCT header_value FROM http_request_headers WHERE header_name = (SELECT header_name FROM http_request_headers WHERE id = 2) AND header_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT http_request_header_full(lines, 'Accept-Encoding', 'identity') AS accept_encoding FROM http_request_headers WHERE header_name = 'Accept-Encoding';
